summary: Completed testing of Export (DOCX/PDF), Image Generation, and Deprecated Endpoints. All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend Export Dialog and Art Studio UI verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Export DOCX endpoint correctly generates valid DOCX files with PK (ZIP) signature
Export PDF endpoint correctly generates valid PDF files with %PDF signature
Both export endpoints properly handle include_title_page and include_chapter_numbers options
Image generation endpoint validates prompt length (min 10 chars) and returns proper response structure
Deprecated manuscripts_collection endpoints return 200 and correctly log warnings to backend logs
Frontend Export Dialog has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Art Studio UI shows saved assets including generated images

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Export Dialog and Art Studio UI verified)

test_credentials: No authentication required. Used project ID: b7bb3190-8ab4-4918-873c-df8991746b7d
seed_data_creation: Test manuscripts created during deprecated endpoint tests were cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three features tested and working: 1) Export DOCX/PDF - POST /api/export/docx and /api/export/pdf return valid binary files with correct headers and signatures, 2) Image Generation - POST /api/ai/generate-image returns image_base64 string (tested with simple prompt, took ~10 seconds), 3) Deprecated Endpoints - All CRUD operations on /api/manuscripts-collection return 200 and log 'Deprecated endpoint /manuscripts-collection called. Use /projects instead.' to backend logs. Frontend Export Dialog opens from ManuscriptWorkspace with format selection (DOCX/PDF), title page toggle, chapter numbers toggle, and shows chapter count/word count. Art Studio shows Generate Art Prompts form and Saved Assets section.

backend_apis: POST /api/export/docx - Returns valid DOCX file (PK signature)
POST /api/export/pdf - Returns valid PDF file (%PDF signature)
POST /api/manuscripts-collection - Creates record with deprecation warning
GET /api/manuscripts-collection/{id} - Returns record with deprecation warning
PUT /api/manuscripts-collection/{id} - Updates record with deprecation warning
DELETE /api/manuscripts-collection/{id} - Deletes record with deprecation warning
frontend_ui: Export button shows correct format (Export DOCX/Export PDF)
Art Studio page loads with Generate Art Prompts form
Saved Assets section shows previously generated images
test_scenarios: Export DOCX with all options enabled
Export DOCX with invalid project returns 404
Export PDF with all options enabled
Export PDF with invalid project returns 404
Image generation with valid prompt returns base64
Image generation with short prompt (<10 chars) returns 400
Image generation with empty prompt returns 400
Deprecated GET single manuscript returns record

deprecation_warnings_verified: Backend logs show 'WARNING - Deprecated endpoint /manuscripts-collection called. Use /projects instead.' for all deprecated endpoint calls
mocked_apis: None - all APIs use real implementations including OpenAI image generation via emergentintegrations
